dashboard.label: SSH Detector - Timeline
dashboard.description: Historical timeline view of SSH attacks

search.query: index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth | timechart span=$granularity$ count by action

index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth | eval date=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d") | stats count as total_events, sum(eval(action="failed")) as failed, sum(eval(action="success")) as success, dc(eval(action="failed")) as attacking_ips, dc(user) as targeted_users by date | eval success_rate=round(success/(success+failed)*100, 2) | sort - date

table.fields: date, total_events, failed, success, attacking_ips, targeted_users, success_rate

search.query: index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth | eval week=strftime(_time, "%Y-W%V") | stats count by week, action | xyseries week action count
index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth action=failed | eval hour=strftime(_time, "%H") | eval day=strftime(_time, "%A") | stats count by day, hour | sort hour | xyseries day hour count

index=ssh_security sourcetype=sshd_auth action=failed | bucket _time span=1d | stats count as daily_attacks | trendline sma5(daily_attacks) as trend_5day | trendline sma10(daily_attacks) as trend_10day | fields _time, daily_attacks, trend_5day, trend_10day
